title: Anathallis lewisiae
taxonomy: Anathallis lewisiae is a species of orchid in the genus Anathallis. It is a member of the family Orchidaceae and subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Anathallis is part of the tribe Maxillarieae and subtribe Pseudostelinae. Anathallis lewisiae is native to Central America. It is classified as a terrestrial orchid, growing in tropical and subtropical regions.

intro: Anathallis lewisiae, also known as the Lewis' anathallis, is a species of orchid native to the Andean region of South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular remedy for treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues.
